title: Support for the visually challenged
description: Providing comprehensive support including job placement, marriage arrangements, and household essentials for the visually challenged community.

sections.title: Employment Opportunities
sections.content: Created specialized job placements in call centers, data entry, and handicraft production for visually challenged individuals.

sections.title: Marriage Support
sections.content: Successfully arranged marriages for 15 couples, providing complete wedding arrangements and household setup.

sections.title: Daily Living Assistance
sections.content: Distributing essential household items, mobility aids, and providing training for independent living.
